holdings.infoBox: CNBS is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Amplify Seymour Cannabis ETF (CNBS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US stocks related to cannabis and hemp. The fund also invests in derivatives with similar characteristics. CNBS was launched on Jul 23, 2019 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
